examples.title: SRS Document Template
examples.description: A template for creating an SRS document, including sections for functional requirements, non-functional requirements, user interface requirements, and system constraints.
examples.code:
SRS DOCUMENT TEMPLATE

I. INTRODUCTION

* Purpose
* Scope
* Definitions

II. FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENTS

* User Stories
* Use Cases
* Functional Requirements

III. NON-FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENTS

* Performance Requirements
* Security Requirements
* Usability Requirements

IV. USER INTERFACE REQUIREMENTS

* User Interface Design
* User Interface Requirements

V. SYSTEM CONSTRAINTS

* Hardware Constraints
* Software Constraints
* Network Constraints
examples.explanation: This template provides a basic structure for creating an SRS document, including sections for functional requirements, non-functional requirements, user interface requirements, and system constraints.
